hero.label: Product Range
hero.headline: PERFORMANCE-GRADE LUBRICANTS FOR EVERY APPLICATION
hero.subheadline: 500+ formulations engineered for industrial, automotive, marine, and specialty applications — manufactured in Gujarat, exported worldwide.

categories.name: Industrial Oils
categories.description: High-performance oils engineered for continuous heavy-duty industrial operations — from gear systems and turbines to compressors and hydraulic circuits.

products.name: JRP Gear Oil EP
products.description: Extreme pressure gear oil formulated with advanced EP additives for enclosed industrial gear systems. Provides excellent load-carrying capacity and thermal stability.
products.applications: Spur, helical, bevel, and worm gears | Steel mills | Cement plants | Paper mills

products.name: JRP Turbine Oil
products.description: Premium turbine oil with excellent oxidation stability and demulsibility for steam and gas turbines in power generation and industrial applications.
products.applications: Steam turbines | Gas turbines | Hydroelectric turbines | Turbochargers

products.name: JRP Hydraulic Oil HLP
products.description: Anti-wear hydraulic oil with zinc-based additive system for high-pressure hydraulic systems in industrial machinery and mobile equipment.
products.applications: Hydraulic presses | Injection moulding | CNC machinery | Construction equipment

products.name: JRP Compressor Oil
products.description: Mineral-based compressor oil with excellent oxidation stability and low carbon deposit formation for rotary screw and reciprocating compressors.
products.applications: Rotary screw compressors | Reciprocating compressors | Vane compressors | Air tools

categories.name: Automotive Lubricants
categories.description: Engine oils, transmission fluids, and specialty automotive lubricants formulated to meet API, ACEA, and OEM specifications for passenger and commercial vehicles.

products.name: JRP Engine Oil SN/CF
products.description: Full and semi-synthetic engine oils meeting API SN/CF standards for modern petrol and diesel engines. Provides superior wear protection and fuel economy.
products.applications: Passenger cars | SUVs | Light commercial vehicles | Motorcycles

products.name: JRP Heavy Duty Diesel Oil
products.description: Heavy-duty diesel engine oil for turbocharged and naturally aspirated diesel engines in trucks, buses, and construction equipment.
products.applications: Heavy trucks | Buses | Construction equipment | Agricultural machinery

products.name: JRP Gear Oil GL-4/GL-5
products.description: Automotive gear oil for manual transmissions, differentials, and axles. Available in GL-4 for synchromesh gearboxes and GL-5 for hypoid axles.
products.applications: Manual gearboxes | Differentials | Transfer cases | Axles

products.name: JRP ATF Fluid
products.description: Automatic transmission fluid for passenger cars and light commercial vehicles. Provides smooth shifting, excellent friction stability, and long service life.
products.applications: Automatic transmissions | Power steering | Torque converters | Hydraulic systems

categories.name: Specialty Greases
categories.description: Lithium complex, calcium sulfonate, and polyurea greases for extreme pressure, high-temperature, and water-resistant applications across industrial and automotive sectors.

products.name: JRP Lithium Complex Grease
products.description: Multi-purpose lithium complex grease with EP additives for bearings, chassis, and general industrial lubrication. Excellent high-temperature performance.
products.applications: Rolling element bearings | Chassis lubrication | Electric motors | Conveyor systems

products.name: JRP Calcium Sulfonate Grease
products.description: High-performance calcium sulfonate complex grease with inherent EP and corrosion protection. Ideal for wet and marine environments.
products.applications: Marine equipment | Offshore machinery | Steel plants | Mining equipment

products.name: JRP High-Temp Grease
products.description: Polyurea-based high-temperature grease for electric motor bearings and high-speed applications requiring long-life lubrication.
products.applications: Electric motor bearings | High-speed spindles | Oven conveyor bearings | Kiln equipment

products.name: JRP Open Gear Compound
products.description: Bitumen-based open gear compound for large open gear drives in cement mills, ball mills, and rotary kilns. Provides excellent adhesion and film strength.
products.applications: Cement mills | Ball mills | Rotary kilns | Dryers

categories.name: Marine & Heavy-Duty
categories.description: Cylinder oils, trunk piston engine oils, and stern tube lubricants designed for marine diesel engines, offshore equipment, and heavy industrial applications.

products.name: JRP Marine Cylinder Oil
products.description: High-alkalinity cylinder lubricant for two-stroke crosshead marine diesel engines. Provides excellent neutralisation of sulphuric acid from high-sulphur fuels.
products.applications: Two-stroke crosshead engines | Container ships | Bulk carriers | Tankers

products.name: JRP Marine Diesel Engine Oil
products.description: Trunk piston engine oil for four-stroke medium-speed marine diesel engines. Provides excellent detergency, dispersancy, and corrosion protection.
products.applications: Four-stroke medium-speed engines | Ferries | Offshore vessels | Fishing vessels

products.name: JRP Stern Tube Lubricant
products.description: Environmentally acceptable stern tube lubricant meeting EAL requirements for vessels operating in environmentally sensitive areas.
products.applications: Stern tube bearings | Rudder bearings | Thruster bearings | Stabiliser bearings

products.name: JRP Industrial Gear Oil HD
products.description: Heavy-duty industrial gear oil for large enclosed gear drives in steel plants, cement plants, and mining operations requiring maximum load-carrying capacity.
products.applications: Large enclosed gears | Steel rolling mills | Cement plant drives | Mining conveyors

certifications.headline: QUALITY YOU CAN CERTIFY
certifications.subheadline: Every JRP product is manufactured under rigorous quality management systems and tested to international standards before leaving our Gujarat facility.

cta.headline: NEED A CUSTOM FORMULATION?
cta.subheadline: Our in-house R&D team develops bespoke lubricant solutions for OEMs and industrial clients with unique application requirements.
